name: Data Extraction Builder
description: Build data extraction rules for unstructured text

agents.name: Pattern Analyst
agents.purpose: Analyze text patterns and design extraction rules
agents.system_prompt_hint: Analyze the unstructured text samples. Identify repeating patterns for the desired data points. Design extraction rules using regex, delimiter-based parsing, or structural patterns. Handle edge cases and variations.

agents.name: Extractor Builder
agents.purpose: Build extraction code and validate results
agents.system_prompt_hint: Build extraction rules/code that: captures all target data points, handles format variations, provides confidence scores, falls back gracefully on unrecognized patterns, and outputs structured data (JSON/CSV). Include test cases with expected outputs.

author: agentfactory
